title: Hula Hoop Kid
prompt: A hula hoop spinning on a kid's waist, gradually climbing to their chest, then dropping to knees, then clattering to the floor. They pick it up to try again.
description: A playful scene of a child spinning a hula hoop — the hoop climbs from waist to chest, drops to knees, then clatters to the floor. The kid picks it up and tries again.
description_zh: 一个孩子转呼啦圈的有趣场景——呼啦圈从腰部爬升到胸部，然后掉到膝盖，最后哐当落地。孩子捡起来再试一次。
description_ja: 子どもがフラフープを回す楽しいシーン。フープは腰から胸へ上がり、膝まで落ちて、最後に床にカタンと落下。子どもはそれを拾ってもう一度挑戦する。
description_ko: 아이가 훌라후프를 돌리는 재미있는 장면 — 후프가 허리에서 가슴으로 올라갔다가 무릎으로 내려오고 바닥에 떨어진다. 아이는 다시 주워 들고 도전한다.
description_es: Una escena divertida de un niño girando un hula hoop: el aro sube de la cintura al pecho, baja a las rodillas y cae al suelo. El niño lo recoge e intenta de nuevo.
tag_ja: 物理シミュレーション
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Golf Ball Putt
prompt: A golf ball in a cup rolling around the rim three times before finally dropping in. The golfer's body language matches each rotation. Audio: Ball rattle, exhale, plop.
description: A golf ball rolls around the rim of the cup three times before finally dropping in. The golfer's body language perfectly matches each rotation — tension, hope, and relief.
description_zh: 高尔夫球在球洞边沿滚动三圈后终于落入。球手的肢体语言完美配合每一次旋转——紧张、期待、释然。
description_ja: ゴルフボールがカップの縁を3周した後、ようやくホールイン。ゴルファーのボディランゲージが回転ごとに完璧にシンクロ——緊張、期待、そして安堵。
description_ko: 골프공이 컵 가장자리를 세 바퀴 돈 후 마침내 들어간다. 골퍼의 몸짓이 매 회전에 완벽하게 맞춰진다 — 긴장, 기대, 그리고 안도.
description_es: Una pelota de golf rueda por el borde del hoyo tres veces antes de caer. El lenguaje corporal del golfista acompaña cada giro: tensión, esperanza y alivio.
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Cat & Toaster Reflection
title_ja: 猫とトースターの映り込み
title_es: Gato y reflejo en la tostadora
prompt: A cat staring at its own reflection in a toaster, paw tapping the chrome surface. The distorted cat reflection taps back. Audio: Paw taps, confused meow.
description: A cat stares at its own distorted reflection in a chrome toaster, tapping the surface with its paw. The reflection taps back.
description_zh: 一只猫盯着烤面包机铬面上自己扭曲的倒影，用爪子轻拍表面。倒影也回拍了过来。
description_ja: 猫がクロムのトースターに映る自分の歪んだ姿を見つめ、前足で表面を叩く。映り込みの猫も叩き返す。
description_ko: 고양이가 크롬 토스터에 비친 자신의 일그러진 모습을 바라보며 앞발로 표면을 두드린다. 반사된 고양이도 되돌려 두드린다.
description_es: Un gato observa su reflejo distorsionado en una tostadora cromada y toca la superficie con la pata. El reflejo le devuelve el gesto.
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Barista Latte Art
title_ja: バリスタのラテアート
prompt: A barista creating latte art by pouring steamed milk into espresso. The white milk submerges beneath the brown crema initially, then breaks through the surface as the cup fills. The barista's wrist makes precise oscillating movements, creating a rosetta pattern. The milk and espresso maintain their distinct colors while interacting at the boundary. Audio: The gentle pour of liquid, the hiss of the steam wand in the background.
description: A barista creates a rosetta latte art pattern by pouring steamed milk into espresso. The milk submerges beneath the crema initially, then breaks through as the cup fills.
description_zh: 咖啡师将蒸汽牛奶倒入浓缩咖啡制作玫瑰花拉花。牛奶先沉入咖啡脂下方，随后在杯子填满时突破表面。
description_ja: バリスタがスチームミルクをエスプレッソに注ぎ、ロゼッタ模様のラテアートを描く。ミルクは最初クレマの下に沈み、カップが満たされるにつれて表面に現れる。
description_ko: 바리스타가 스팀 밀크를 에스프레소에 부어 로제타 라테아트를 만든다. 우유는 처음 크레마 아래로 가라앉았다가 컵이 차면서 표면을 뚫고 나온다.
description_es: Un barista crea un patrón de rosetta vertiendo leche vaporizada sobre espresso. La leche se sumerge bajo la crema al principio y luego emerge a medida que se llena la taza.
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Flower Bloom & Wilt Timelapse
title_ja: 花の開花と枯れのタイムラプス
prompt: A flower blooming and wilting over two weeks, one photo per day. Same vase, same window, same angle. Light changes with weather. Audio: Quiet domestic.
description: A two-week timelapse of a flower blooming and wilting — one photo per day, same vase, same window, same angle. Light changes naturally with the weather.
description_zh: 两周花开花落延时摄影——每天一张照片，同一花瓶、同一窗户、同一角度。光线随天气自然变化。
description_ja: 2週間にわたる花の開花と枯れのタイムラプス。毎日1枚、同じ花瓶、同じ窓、同じアングル。光は天気とともに自然に変化する。
description_ko: 2주간 꽃이 피고 지는 타임랩스 — 매일 한 장, 같은 꽃병, 같은 창문, 같은 각도. 빛은 날씨에 따라 자연스럽게 변한다.
description_es: Un timelapse de dos semanas de una flor floreciendo y marchitándose: una foto por día, mismo jarrón, misma ventana, mismo ángulo. La luz cambia naturalmente con el clima.
author: HappyHorse Team

title: 90s Action Cartoon Firebending
title_ja: 90年代アクションカートン ファイアベンディング
title_es: Control del fuego estilo dibujos de los 90
prompt: 1990s action cartoon style  A young martial artist performs a firebending kata. The flames are hand-drawn with thick outlines and bold orange-yellow gradients. Dynamic camera swoops around the character. The fighting stance shows anime influence while maintaining Western animation proportions. Smoke effects use the signature layered look of the era. Audio: Whooshing fire, martial arts grunts, dramatic percussion.
description: A 1990s action cartoon-style martial artist performing a firebending kata with hand-drawn flames, thick outlines, and dynamic camera work blending anime and Western animation aesthetics.
description_zh: 90年代动作卡通风格的武术家表演火焰术，手绘火焰配粗线条和大胆的橙黄渐变，动态镜头运动融合了日本动漫与西方动画的美学。
description_ja: 1990年代アクションカートンスタイルの武道家がファイアベンディングの型を披露。手描きの炎、太い輪郭線、ダイナミックなカメラワークで、アニメと西洋アニメーションの美学が融合。
description_ko: 1990년대 액션 만화 스타일의 무술가가 파이어벤딩 동작을 선보인다. 손으로 그린 불꽃, 굵은 외곽선, 역동적인 카메라 워크로 애니메와 서양 애니메이션 미학이 조화를 이룬다.
description_es: Un artista marcial al estilo de dibujos animados de acción de los 90 realizando una kata de fuego con llamas dibujadas a mano, líneas gruesas y cámara dinámica que fusiona estéticas anime y occidental.
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Cyberpunk Anime Android Repair
title_zh: 赛博朋克动漫机器人维修
title_ja: サイバーパンクアニメ アンドロイド修理
prompt: Cyberpunk anime style  (aesthetic). A female android sits in a maintenance chair as robotic arms repair her damaged arm. The skin panel is open, revealing intricate servos and fiber-optic cables beneath. Her eyes are blank and unfocused during the repair cycle. Neon city lights filter through rain-streaked windows. Cool blue and pink color palette with high contrast shadows. Audio: Mechanical whirring, the hum of electronics, distant city ambience.
description: A cyberpunk anime scene of a female android being repaired by robotic arms, revealing intricate mechanical internals beneath the skin panel. Neon city lights and rain-streaked windows create atmospheric blue-pink lighting.
description_zh: 赛博朋克动漫风格场景，机械臂正在维修一个女性机器人的手臂，打开的皮肤面板下露出精密的伺服机构和光纤电缆。霓虹灯光透过雨水冲刷的窗户，营造出蓝粉色氛围光影。
description_ja: サイバーパンクアニメの一場面。ロボットアームが女性アンドロイドを修理し、スキンパネルの下から精巧なメカ内部が露出している。ネオンの街灯と雨に濡れた窓がブルーピンクの雰囲気を演出。
description_ko: 사이버펑크 애니메 장면. 로봇 팔이 여성 안드로이드를 수리하며 피부 패널 아래 정교한 기계 내부가 드러난다. 네온 도시 조명과 빗물 흐르는 창문이 블루핑크 분위기를 만든다.
description_es: Una escena de anime cyberpunk donde brazos robóticos reparan a una androide, revelando intrincados mecanismos bajo el panel de piel. Luces de neón y ventanas con lluvia crean una atmósfera azul-rosa.
tag_ja: サイバーパンクアニメ
author: HappyHorse Team

title: Museum Split Diopter
title_ja: 美術館スプリットダイオプター
prompt: [Split Diopter] Inside a museum hall, place a statue's intricate marble face sharp in the foreground on the left, and visitors inspecting a tapestry at the far end of the corridor sharp on the right. The split diopter keeps both planes in focus, creating a layered depth of storytelling.
description: A split diopter shot inside a museum — marble statue face sharp in foreground, visitors sharp in background. Both planes in focus for cinematic layered depth.
description_zh: 博物馆内的分屏对焦镜头——前景大理石雕像面部清晰，背景游客同样清晰，双焦平面创造电影级景深叙事。
description_ja: 美術館でのスプリットダイオプターショット。前景の大理石像の顔と背景の来館者がともに鮮明に映り、映画的な奥行きの層を生み出す。
description_ko: 박물관 내 스플릿 디옵터 촬영 — 전경의 대리석 조각상 얼굴과 배경의 관람객 모두 선명하게 초점이 맞아 영화적 깊이감을 연출한다.
description_es: Toma con dióptrico partido dentro de un museo: el rostro de mármol nítido en primer plano y los visitantes nítidos al fondo, creando profundidad cinematográfica en capas.
tag_ja: スプリットダイオプター
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Mannequins Playing Golf
prompt: Bring the mannequins to life as they play golf, talk with one another and do practice swings.
description: Mannequins come to life on a golf course — playing, chatting, and doing practice swings. Image-to-video generation with natural human-like motion.
description_zh: 人体模型在高尔夫球场上活了过来——打球、聊天、练习挥杆。图生视频，展示自然的类人运动。
description_ja: マネキンがゴルフ場で生き生きと動き出す——プレー、会話、素振り。自然な人間らしい動きの画像から動画への生成。
description_ko: 마네킹들이 골프장에서 살아 움직인다 — 플레이하고, 대화하고, 연습 스윙을 한다. 자연스러운 인간 동작의 이미지-투-비디오 생성.
description_es: Los maniquíes cobran vida en un campo de golf: juegan, charlan y practican swings. Generación de imagen a video con movimientos naturales.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Excavator at Construction Site
title_ja: 建設現場のショベルカー
prompt: A hyper-realistic shot of a massive excavator digging deep into the earth at a construction site. The metal claw lifts tons of dirt with ease, its mechanical movements precise and rhythmic against the backdrop of a growing skyscraper.
description: Hyper-realistic excavator digging into earth with precise mechanical movements against the backdrop of a growing skyscraper.
description_zh: 超写实的挖掘机深入挖掘地面，金属爪轻松抬起大量泥土，机械动作精准有节奏，背景是正在建造的摩天大楼。
description_ja: 超リアルなショベルカーが精密な機械動作で地面を掘削。建設中の高層ビルを背景に、金属のアームが大量の土を軽々と持ち上げる。
description_ko: 초현실적인 굴착기가 정밀한 기계 동작으로 땅을 파낸다. 건설 중인 고층 빌딩을 배경으로 금속 집게가 흙을 가볍게 들어 올린다.
description_es: Una excavadora hiperrealista cavando la tierra con movimientos mecánicos precisos, con un rascacielos en construcción de fondo.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Firefighter Running to Burning Building
title_ja: 炎上する建物に向かう消防士
title_es: Bombero corriendo hacia un edificio en llamas
prompt: A firefighter in her mid-30s runs toward a burning building, unrolling a hose as smoke billows into the sky, the scene tense and urgent.
description: A firefighter runs toward a burning building, unrolling a hose as smoke billows. Tense, urgent atmosphere with dynamic human motion and fire effects.
description_zh: 一名消防员冲向燃烧的建筑，边跑边展开水管，浓烟滚滚升向天空，场面紧张而紧迫。
description_ja: 消防士が燃える建物に向かって走り、ホースを伸ばしながら煙が空に立ち上る。緊迫した雰囲気の中、ダイナミックな人体動作と炎の表現。
description_ko: 소방관이 불타는 건물을 향해 달리며 호스를 풀고, 연기가 하늘로 치솟는다. 긴박한 분위기 속 역동적인 인체 움직임과 화염 효과.
description_es: Un bombero corre hacia un edificio en llamas desenrollando una manguera mientras el humo se eleva. Atmósfera tensa con movimiento dinámico y efectos de fuego.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: City Square at Sunset
title_es: Plaza de la ciudad al atardecer
prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a bustling city square at sunset, filled with people hurrying in every direction. Street vendors call out, tourists take photos, and pigeons flutter between the crowds, as the soft golden light reflects off surrounding buildings.
description: Cinematic wide shot of a bustling city square at sunset — people hurrying, vendors calling, tourists photographing, pigeons fluttering in golden light.
description_zh: 日落时分繁华城市广场的电影级广角镜头——行人匆匆、小贩叫卖、游客拍照、鸽子在人群间飞舞，柔和金光映照周围建筑。
description_ja: 夕暮れの賑やかな街の広場をシネマティックなワイドショットで捉える。人々が行き交い、露店商が呼び込み、観光客が写真を撮り、鳩が金色の光の中を舞う。
description_ko: 일몰 무렵 붐비는 도시 광장의 시네마틱 와이드 샷 — 사람들이 오가고, 노점상이 호객하고, 관광객이 사진을 찍고, 비둘기가 황금빛 속을 날아다닌다.
description_es: Plano general cinematográfico de una bulliciosa plaza al atardecer: gente apresurada, vendedores pregonando, turistas fotografiando y palomas revoloteando en la luz dorada.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Vintage Car Restoration Time-lapse
title_ja: クラシックカー修復タイムラプス
title_es: Timelapse de restauración de auto clásico
prompt: A time-lapse of a vintage car restoration shop where mechanics carefully disassemble an old classic vehicle, piece by piece, before restoring it to its former glory. The scene captures the transformation from rusty shell to polished beauty in just seconds.
description: Time-lapse of mechanics restoring a vintage car from rusty shell to polished beauty — transformation captured in seconds.
description_zh: 老爷车修复工坊延时摄影——技师逐步拆解、修复经典老车，从锈迹斑斑的外壳到光亮如新，数秒内完成蜕变。
description_ja: クラシックカー修復のタイムラプス。錆びた外殻から磨き上げられた美しい姿への変貌を数秒で捉える。
description_ko: 클래식카 복원 타임랩스. 녹슨 껍데기에서 광택 나는 아름다운 모습으로의 변신을 수 초 만에 담아낸다.
description_es: Timelapse de la restauración de un auto clásico: de carcasa oxidada a belleza reluciente, la transformación capturada en segundos.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Forest Camera Tilt Up
prompt: Have the camera slowly move forward and tilt up to the trees
description: Camera slowly moves forward through a forest and tilts upward to reveal the tree canopy. Smooth camera motion control.
description_zh: 摄像机缓缓穿过森林并向上仰拍，揭示树冠全貌。流畅的摄像机运动控制。
description_ja: カメラが森の中をゆっくり前進しながら上方にティルトし、樹冠を映し出す。滑らかなカメラモーション制御。
description_ko: 카메라가 숲 속을 천천히 전진하며 위로 틸트하여 나무 꼭대기를 드러낸다. 부드러운 카메라 움직임 제어.
description_es: La cámara avanza lentamente por un bosque y se inclina hacia arriba para revelar la copa de los árboles. Control de movimiento de cámara suave.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Kangaroos Boxing at Sunset
title_ja: 夕焼けのカンガルーボクシング
prompt: Kangaroos boxing in a dusty outback at sunset, silhouetted against the orange sky.
description: Kangaroos boxing in the dusty Australian outback at sunset, silhouetted against the orange sky.
description_zh: 日落时分，袋鼠在尘土飞扬的澳大利亚内陆拳击，剪影映衬橙色天空。
description_ja: 夕焼けのオーストラリアの荒野で、砂埃の中カンガルーがボクシング。オレンジ色の空にシルエットが浮かび上がる。
description_ko: 일몰 무렵 먼지 이는 호주 아웃백에서 캥거루들이 복싱을 한다. 주황색 하늘에 실루엣이 드리운다.
description_es: Canguros boxeando en el polvoriento outback australiano al atardecer, en silueta contra el cielo anaranjado.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Coastline Pullback
prompt: Camera slowly pulls back and rises higher, revealing more of the coastline and ocean horizon beyond the breaking waves.
description: Camera pulls back and rises, revealing a sweeping coastline and ocean horizon beyond breaking waves.
description_zh: 摄像机缓缓后拉并升高，展现海岸线全貌和浪花后方的大洋地平线。
description_ja: カメラが後退しながら上昇し、波打ち際の向こうに広がる海岸線と海の地平線を映し出す。
description_ko: 카메라가 뒤로 물러나며 상승하여 파도 너머로 펼쳐지는 해안선과 수평선을 드러낸다.
description_es: La cámara retrocede y se eleva, revelando la línea costera y el horizonte del océano más allá de las olas.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Spaceship Landing Shockwave
title_es: Aterrizaje de nave con onda expansiva
prompt: Make the spaceship land on the ground, creating a shockwave throughout the surrounding environment.
description: A spaceship lands creating a powerful shockwave that ripples through the environment. VFX particle effects and physics simulation.
description_zh: 飞船降落地面，产生强大冲击波波及周围环境。粒子特效与物理模拟。
description_ja: 宇宙船が着陸し、周囲に強力な衝撃波が広がる。VFXパーティクルエフェクトと物理シミュレーション。
description_ko: 우주선이 착륙하며 강력한 충격파가 주변 환경으로 퍼져 나간다. VFX 파티클 이펙트와 물리 시뮬레이션.
description_es: Una nave espacial aterriza generando una poderosa onda expansiva que recorre el entorno. Efectos de partículas VFX y simulación física.
author: Artificial Analysis Arena

title: Wax Man Melting in the Sun
title_es: Hombre de cera derritiéndose al sol
prompt: Slowly push in while the wax man melts in the sun
description: A wax figure slowly melting under the sun with a push-in camera shot. Material deformation and viscous fluid dynamics.
description_zh: 蜡像在阳光下缓缓融化，配合推进镜头。材质变形与粘性流体动力学。
description_ja: 太陽の下で蝋人形がゆっくり溶けていく様をプッシュインで捉える。素材変形と粘性流体のダイナミクス。
description_ko: 햇볕 아래 밀랍 인형이 천천히 녹는 모습을 푸시인 카메라로 담는다. 재질 변형과 점성 유체 역학.
description_es: Una figura de cera se derrite lentamente bajo el sol con un plano de acercamiento. Deformación de materiales y dinámica de fluidos viscosos.
tag_ja: マテリアルシミュレーション
author: Artificial Analysis Arena
